LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HARJINDAR CHIMA, CHIMA, HARJINDAR S., TRUSTEE, 1996 HARJINDAR AND MARGARET CHIMA FAMILY TRUST'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION IS OFF CALENDAR PER THE AMENDED NOTICE FILED JULY 17, 2013. THE NEW HEARING DATE IS AUGUST 12, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER CSR 4761.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-01-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-12-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HARJINDAR CHIMA, CHIMA, HARJINDAR S., TRUSTEE, 1996 HARJINDAR AND MARGARET CHIMA FAMILY TRUST'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO SOLANO COUNTY IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SUFFICIENTLY DEMONSTRATED THAT THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES AND THE ENDS OF JUSTICE WILL BE PROMOTED BY TRANSFER TO SOLANO COUNTY. (CCP 397(D).) AT THE TIME OF FILING OF THE MOTION, NO DISCOVERY HAD COMMENCED, AND DEFENDANTS' MOTION IS BASED ON THE ANTICIPATION THAT THEY WILL CALL A NUMBER OF WITNESSES IN SOLANO COUNTY. (DASHMAN BOER DECL., 6.) EVIDENCE PROFFERED IN REPLY IS IMPROPER AND WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Defendants Harjindar Chima, Chima, Harjindar S., Trustee, 1996 Harjindar And Margaret Chima Family Trust'S Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants Harjindar Chima, Chima, Harjindar S., Trustee, 1996 Harjindar And Margaret Chima Family Trust'S Motion To Transfer Action to Solano County is Denied, without prejudice. Defendants have not sufficiently demonstrated that the convenience of witnesses and the ends of justice will be promoted by transfer to Solano County. (CCP 397(d).) At the time of filing of the motion, no discovery had commenced, and Defendants' motion is based on the anticipation that they will call a number of witnesses in Solano County. (Dashman Boer Decl., 6.) Evidence proffered in reply is improper and will not be considered. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
